# DMS Wins 41.2 Billion Won Display Equipment Order From China's HKC

## Wet Processing Systems to Be Supplied for Mianyang Gen-6 LCD Line Following CSOT Contract

* KIMGEON
* Published 2026.07.06 22:49
* Reply 0

Character Size Settings

가

가

The body content of the article will be changed to this letter size.

이 기사를 공유합니다

DMS has secured a contract to supply liquid crystal display (LCD) manufacturing equipment to Chinese display maker HKC Corporation.

DMS announced on July 6 that it signed a 41.2 billion won contract with HKC to supply display manufacturing equipment. The equipment will be installed at HKC's H7 sixth-generation LCD fabrication line currently under construction in Mianyang, Sichuan Province, China.

Under the agreement, DMS will supply wet processing equipment used in display manufacturing, including cleaning, developing, stripping and etching systems. The contract further expands the company's supply record with major Chinese display panel manufacturers.

Last month, DMS signed a separate 67.7 billion won contract with TCL China Star Optoelectronics Technology to supply organic light-emitting diode (OLED) manufacturing equipment.

A DMS representative said the company continues to secure new orders as Chinese display manufacturers increase equipment investments. The company added that it is leveraging its display equipment expertise to develop glass substrate equipment for semiconductor manufacturing as well as equipment for organic light-emitting diode on silicon (OLEDoS) production.
